Create a child height prediction tool using the Khamis-Roche method. The tool should accept: child's age (years), current height (cm or ft/in), child's gender, father's height, mother's height. It should calculate predicted adult height with a range. Include unit toggle between metric and imperial. Display a clear disclaimer that predictions are estimates and can be affected by nutrition, health, and other factors. Keep it focused - single purpose only, no accounts, no data storage.
user provides: client name, line items (description, quantity, unit price), tax rate, payment terms, notes

Pick a class (Barbarian, Ninja, Paladin), visit the town hub to buy gear and heal, enter the dungeon, survive random encounters, manage health and resources, reach and defeat the boss, then save your progress or restart with a new class.

I need a Tabata interval timer that handles timed exercise and rest intervals. It should: count down work periods and rest periods, cycle through configured rounds (standard Tabata is 20s work / 10s rest × 8 rounds), allow configurable work duration, rest duration, number of rounds, and number of cycles, provide start/pause/reset controls, play audio alert for last 3 seconds of each interval, show visual phase indicator distinguishing work vs rest vs complete states, and optionally allow saving preset configurations for quick reuse. No workout logging, no social features, no broader fitness suite.
Calculate the fat percentage of a food item

Create a self-contained, single-file Wordle-style game module in [Python/JavaScript] designed as a programming learning exercise. Include: (1) embedded word list with 50-100 common 5-letter words, (2) input validation for alphabetic 5-letter guesses, (3) color-coded feedback per letter (correct, misplaced, absent), (4) max 6 attempts, (5) readable code structure with comments explaining loops, conditionals, and file-I/O patterns. The module should be executable as a standalone script or importable as a teaching artifact.
I need to rank a list of options by comparing them in pairs and selecting the best from each pair to build a ranked shortlist
user profile (age, sex, pregnancy/lactation status, activity level)

a user wants to evaluate whether it makes more sense to pay down a loan early or invest that money instead. The module should accept loan details (principal, interest rate, term) and investment details (starting amount, monthly contribution, expected return, time horizon). It outputs the amortization schedule for the loan showing principal/interest breakdown per payment, the investment projection showing growth over time, and a comparison view that aligns both timelines so the user can see the opportunity cost of allocating extra money to loan payoff vs. investment.
What resource category are you seeking?
